label: 株式会社ZOZO公式プレスリリース
scope: Campaign title, order period, ZOZOTOWN collaboration goods overview, participating apparel brands, featured item names, variation counts, prices, delivery-period note, and official campaign special-page URL.

label: ZOZOTOWN特設ページ
scope: Public special-page route for the campaign. The current page may no longer expose full item detail after the campaign ended; item facts in this package rely on the ZOZO corporate release.

label: AppBank ZOZOTOWN item image coverage
scope: Archive reference for item-specific product images when the official ZOZOTOWN item pages are not directly available.
